items.title: Search continues for two missing US soldiers in Morocco
items.desc: Two U.S. soldiers that disappeared while on a training deployment in southern Morocco were last seen near seaside cliffs and may have fallen into the ocean, a U.S. defense official confirmed to AFP.

items.desc: Here's something archaeologists don't see every day, or indeed ever: An ancient Egyptian mummy with an excerpt from the classic Greek text the Iliad plastered to its abdomen.

items.title: NATO chief says Europeans have 'gotten message' from Trump
items.desc: Europeans have "heard" U.S. President Donald Trump's message of frustration over the Iran war and are "stepping up," NATO chief Mark Rutte said yesterday after Washington announced it would withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany.
